concepts.title: The Solar System
concepts.dialogue: A wild The Solar System monster blocks the path, quizzing you about The Solar System!
concepts.source_span: The Sun contains about 99.8% of the Solar System's total mass.

question.prompt: Which statement about "The Solar System" is true?
options: Jupiter is the largest planet in the Solar System.
Mars has the largest volcano in the Solar System, Olympus Mons.
Mercury is the smallest planet and the closest to the Sun.
The Sun contains about 99.8% of the Solar System's total mass.

grounding.quoted_span: The Sun contains about 99.8% of the Solar System's total mass.

concepts.title: Mercury
concepts.dialogue: A wild Mercury monster blocks the path, quizzing you about Mercury!
concepts.source_span: Mercury is the smallest planet and the closest to the Sun.

options: Mercury is the smallest planet and the closest to the Sun.
Jupiter's Great Red Spot is a giant storm larger than Earth.
The Sun contains about 99.8% of the Solar System's total mass.
Venus rotates in the opposite direction to most other planets.

grounding.quoted_span: Mercury is the smallest planet and the closest to the Sun.

concepts.title: Venus
concepts.dialogue: A wild Venus monster blocks the path, quizzing you about Venus!
concepts.source_span: Venus rotates in the opposite direction to most other planets.

options: Mercury is the smallest planet and the closest to the Sun.
Earth's atmosphere is about 78% nitrogen and 21% oxygen.
Venus rotates in the opposite direction to most other planets.
The Sun contains about 99.8% of the Solar System's total mass.

grounding.quoted_span: Venus rotates in the opposite direction to most other planets.

concepts.title: Earth

concepts.source_span: Earth's atmosphere is about 78% nitrogen and 21% oxygen.

options: Jupiter's Great Red Spot is a giant storm larger than Earth.

concepts.title: Jupiter
concepts.dialogue: A wild Jupiter monster blocks the path, quizzing you about Jupiter!
concepts.source_span: Jupiter is the largest planet in the Solar System.

options: Venus rotates in the opposite direction to most other planets.
Jupiter is the largest planet in the Solar System.
Mars is known as the Red Planet because of iron oxide on its surface.
The Sun contains about 99.8% of the Solar System's total mass.

grounding.quoted_span: Jupiter is the largest planet in the Solar System.
